title: Hutong Parchment
description: A reference-dependent series: one modern Beijing hutong route topology followed by three antique treasure-map transformations that preserve the same street geometry.
creative_direction: This package tests data-format transformation. Image 01 establishes a non-branded modern hutong route network; images 02-04 depend on it as the primary reference and reinterpret the same topology as parchment, wax-sealed, and travel-keepsake artifacts.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Hutong Parchment
en.description: A reference-dependent series preserving one modern Beijing hutong route topology across antique treasure-map transformations.

zh-CN.title: 胡同羊皮纸系列
zh-CN.description: 一组依赖参考图的地图换壳系列，在古地图材质中保留同一套北京胡同路线拓扑。
